text:
The was a trial held at Attack Junior High School.

Prelude

The night following the Sports Day challenge, the first years are invited by their upperclassmen to do a test of courage. After Levi explains the rules, they are separated in two groups. Reiner, Bertholdt, Sasha, Ymir and Christa leave first then it is the turn of the five remaining: Eren, Mikasa, Armin, Jean, and Conny.
